channel.title: Data-Science on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Science on jamesm.blog

item.title: Data Engineering & Data Science Courses
item.description: Comprehensive curated list of data engineering and data science courses from Coursera, DataCamp, A Cloud Guru, Udacity, Google Cloud, and other platforms with learning paths and certifications.

item.title: Scaling Graph Algorithms: From Prototypes to Production
item.description: How to take graph algorithms from laptop experiments to production systems handling billions of nodes. Covers memory constraints, distributed computation, query patterns, and the hidden costs nobody talks about.

item.title: Community Detection Algorithms: Finding Clusters and Groups in Network Data
item.description: Deep dive into community detection: how Louvain, modularity, and spectral clustering work. Practical guide to finding natural groups in networks and why they matter for fraud, social networks, and product recommendations.

item.title: Graph Algorithms Explained: PageRank, Centrality, and Why They Matter
item.description: A practical guide to understanding graph algorithms: how PageRank actually works, when to use centrality measures, and why these patterns matter for real-world problems like recommendation systems and fraud detection.
